calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Omar J. Centeno.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 25, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 5, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, October 5, 2009.
Declaration of Rhonda Hedges in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial (CCP Section 98) was filed today, October 5, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against defendant Omar J. Centeno as follows:

Principal - $10,882.19.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $250.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $11,257.19.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
